changeSet.author: User
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dogs (name, type) VALUES ('Dog 1', 'Type A'), ('Dog 2', 'Type B'), ('Dog 3', 'Type C'), ('Dog 4', 'Type A'), ('Dog 5', 'Type B'), ('Dog 6', 'Type C'), ('Dog 7', 'Type A'), ('Dog 8', 'Type B'), ('Dog 9', 'Type C'), ('Dog 10', 'Type A'), ('Dog 11', 'Type B'), ('Dog 12', 'Type C'), ('Dog 13', 'Type A'), ('Dog 14', 'Type B'), ('Dog 15', 'Type C'), ('Dog 16', 'Type A'),
